title: Clarity
description:
The Ultimate Minecraft Experience, Optimized!

Visual Modpack Considering Low PC Specs
body:
Clarity, the Ultimate Minecraft Experience, Optimized

- A collection of mods focused on visuals and sound ambience 
- Heavily Optimized while keeping visual fidelity
- Implimenting some of the newest and greatest mods availiable
- highly customizable and tweaking is easy
- Recommended System Requirements 
  - Windows 11 or 10
  - 16 GB's of Ram
  - 4 of more GB's of VRAM
  - Radeon 6500 xt, Nvidia GeForce 1050 Ti or equal performance card
  - 1440p or 4k Resolution
  - Intel Core i5-11400, Ryzen 5500 XT or similar performance CPU
- These Recommended System Requirements have been tested to run 60+ Frames on 1440p Resolution.
- This also was made because old modpacks simply dont cut it! This modpack prides itself with being compatible with the Newest and best versions of minecraft!

Big Thanks to all the creators of these mods!
